creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
About this:

It turns out that while the ARM1176 core in the RPi 1 can in principle execute thumb2 instructions, I wasn't able to get any thumb2 instructions to work under FreeBSD.  Some like

    f847 6d04       str.w   r6, [r7, #-4]!

cause termination with SIGSEGV, others a SIGILL.  Could it perhaps be that thumb2 needs to be enabled by the kernel and the kernel just doesn't do it?
